name: Huang Gai (Gongfu)
page_title: Huang Gai (Gongfu) 黃蓋 (公覆) [Yuan Shu, Wu] – Romance of the Three Kingdoms Encyclopedia – Kongming’s Archives
novel_notes:
Differences Between Fact and Common Fiction
	
		
	Huang Gai did surrender to Cao Cao with intention of betraying him during the Battle of Red Cliffs, but he was not beaten or punished to make it more believable.
	The ‘Magnificent Five of Wu’ is a fan creation with no historical basis. Huang Gai was not a part of any such group.

full_text:
Huang Gai (Gongfu) 黃蓋 (公覆)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Huang Gai (黃蓋), styledGongfu (公覆), was born in Quan Ling County, Ling Ling Precinct (Presently Ling Ling in Hunan Province). Veteran general in Wu. Came up with the “Bitter Meat Plan” for Chibi. Huang Gai was affiliated with Yuan Shu and the Wu Kingdom. Huang Gai lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.

Fact vs Fiction
Differences Between Fact and Common Fiction
Huang Gai did surrender to Cao Cao with intention of betraying him during the Battle of Red Cliffs, but he was not beaten or punished to make it more believable.
The ‘Magnificent Five of Wu’ is a fan creation with no historical basis. Huang Gai was not a part of any such group.
